title: Reduced Catalogue Search Runtime Cost
summary: Lazy-loaded opt-in search performance instrumentation and reduced repeated query work in the public Catalogue search route.
effect: Normal Catalogue search visits avoid the performance helper payload, query scoring reuses normalized tokens, and list expansion reuses the sorted match set while preserving the existing UI contract.
verification: node --check assets/js/catalogue-search.js && node --check assets/js/search/search-performance.js && node --check assets/js/search/search-policy.js
Browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:4000/catalogue/search/?q=body confirmed 50 of 55 results
